title: Stable SPA release — Vue UI, JSON API, HTMX removed
notes: First stable release: Vue 3 SPA at /app/ over JSON /api/v1; HTMX stack removed
Full and API-only deploy modes; OpenAPI contract and SPA API docs
Task board parity restored: sidebar edit, drag reorder, infinite scroll, filters, saved views
Device authorization for Android SSO; footer restored with Ordryn credit

title: Calendar, digest, security hardening
notes: In-app calendar view and ICS due-date import on Profile
Daily email digest (opt-in), completed-this-week filter, extended undo with ID restore
Calendar feed security: empty response for bad tokens, ban enforcement, RFC ICS improvements
Profile CSRF, validation, RequireAuth; shared DB pool; subpath routing; hx-boost nav; filter URL sync

title: Profile calendar feed fixes
notes: Fixed ICS subscribe URL duplicating the site URL when basePath is configured as a full URL
Fixed Copy button on Profile not copying the calendar feed URL (clipboard fallback for HTTP)

title: UX consistency and guidance
notes: Undo toast now matches 60-second server window
Bulk delete and undo re-bind HTMX so edit/toggle work without refresh
Edit form Activity panel fixed for CSP (no evalDisallowedError)
Global HTMX error toasts for failed requests and network errors
Filter chips on all screen sizes with click-to-remove and Clear all filters
Bulk delete uses same styled modal as single delete; project/tag delete requires confirmation
Empty states with Add Task, Clear search, and Reset filters actions
Dashboard stat cards link to filtered home views
Keyboard: Enter edits focused row; d opens delete
Bulk due-date presets (Today, Tomorrow, +1 week)
Import success shows View tasks link; tag filter refreshes after tag changes
Profile logic moved to profile.js module; loading indicators on projects and pagination

title: Post-roadmap features and UX polish
notes: Undo delete, ICS calendar feed, import preview, bulk due-date actions
Loading indicators, sidebar backdrop, sticky bulk bar, mobile filter collapse
Calendar sync discoverability and undo-aware delete messaging

title: Initial changelog
notes: Added changelog modal UI
Changelog entries are stored in config/changelog.json and served at /changelog
Optionally, changelog can be fetched from GitHub releases if GITHUB_REPO is set in .env
